aiFindings.description: Trust signals are absent from the homepage — no testimonials, certifications, or social proof visible above the fold
Primary navigation uses ambiguous labels like 'Solutions' and 'Platform' without clear differentiation
Pricing page requires users to contact sales for all tiers, creating friction for self-serve buyers
Product screenshots are low resolution and appear blurry on retina displays
Blog content is dated — most recent post is from 8 months ago, signaling inactivity
Mobile hamburger menu requires two taps to reach any product page, increasing navigation depth
Footer contains 47 links organized in 6 columns with no visual hierarchy or grouping logic
Security page mentions SOC 2 compliance but provides no certificate link or audit date
Case study pages use generic stock photography instead of actual customer imagery
Error states on the signup form show technical messages like 'ERR_422' instead of human-readable guidance
The comparison page against competitors is missing — users searching for alternatives find no guidance
Cookie consent banner covers 40% of mobile viewport and has no 'reject all' option

humanFindings.description: No social proof or trust indicators on the homepage — feels unestablished
Navigation labels are confusing — 'Solutions' vs 'Platform' vs 'Products' overlap
Can't see pricing without talking to sales — major conversion blocker
Product images look outdated and low quality
Blog hasn't been updated in months — looks abandoned
SOC 2 claim on security page has no proof — where's the certificate?
Signup form shows cryptic error codes when validation fails
Cookie banner is way too big on mobile and hard to dismiss

adjudications.label: VALID
adjudications.reasoning: Mobile navigation depth is a real usability issue not caught by human auditors

adjudications.label: LOW_VALUE
adjudications.reasoning: Footer organization is minor and subjective

adjudications.label: VALID
adjudications.reasoning: Stock photos on case studies genuinely undermine credibility

adjudications.label: VALID
adjudications.reasoning: Missing comparison page is a significant content gap for buyer journey
